hook.name: ClankerHookDynamicFeeV2
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook for Clanker token pools that dynamically adjusts LP fees based on a tick-volatility accumulator model, and takes a protocol fee (20% of the LP fee) on swaps involving the non-Clanker paired token. Includes an optional MEV-protection module active for up to 2 minutes after pool creation.
